visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator with long dark hair and a white T-shirt featuring a pink My Melody graphic stands before a neutral indoor background. She holds a clear plastic bag of green pickled mangoes in her right hand and a large glass jar of the same fruit with a red lid in her left. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a home studio setup. (2) The scene shifts to the creator kneeling on the floor beside a black textured chair. She places the jar on the chair seat and uses both hands with significant physical effort to twist open the red lid, her face showing an expression of intense concentration and struggle. (3) Returning to a medium close-up, the creator uses a silver spoon to taste the mangoes from the jar and then directly from the plastic bag. Her facial expressions transition from curiosity to pure delight, with wide eyes and a smiling mouth as she chews the crunchy fruit. (4) The creator holds a large hamburger in a brown paper wrapper while continuing to eat the pickled mango slices. She gestures with her hands toward the camera, pointing at the food combination. The background remains the same indoor residential setting with warm artificial lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天要來吃看看「情人果」. (2) [Subtitle]: 我先抱怨一下(?). (3) [Subtitle]: 台灣人真不友善?. (4) [Variety]: 為什麼????為什麼?. [Logo]: 🇰🇷. (5) [Subtitle]: 超愛吃芒果. (6) [Subtitle]: 特別是青芒果. (7) [Subtitle]: 以前都直接切來吃 (只有吃鮮果). (8) [Subtitle]: 一年四季都想吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 我住台灣第九年. (10) [Subtitle]: 今年才知道「情人果」的存在. (11) [Subtitle]: 你們竟然都自己偷偷吃?. (12) [Variety]: 開箱!. (13) [Subtitle]: 但是蓋子打不開誒... (14) [Variety]: 好好笑. (15) [Variety]: (幸福). (16) [Subtitle]: 這味道也太香了吧!. (17) [Subtitle]: 其實青芒果配糖 就是我的天花板組合. (18) [Subtitle]: 但一年四季都能這樣吃 情人果真的太讚了!. (19) [Subtitle]: (兩個從不同家買的). (20) [Subtitle]: 第一家：蠻甜!. (21) [Subtitle]: 第二包是直接用塑膠袋裝的. (22) [Variety]: 超冰. [Variety]: 🧊. (23) [Subtitle]: 還有一起吃那個碎冰的爽感. (24) [Variety]: 超級喜歡. (25) [Subtitle]: 這裡比較接近我的胃口 比較不甜. (26) [Subtitle]: 還有那種青芒果特有的「草」香氣 有一種香氣啦. [Variety]: 💚. (27) [Subtitle]: 但口感的話，還是第一家贏!. (28) [Subtitle]: 準備分享給朋友們喔. (29) [Variety]: 漢堡. (30) [Subtitle]: 我每次在台灣吃漢堡或披薩的時候. (31) [Subtitle]: 為什麼不給醃小黃瓜?. (32) [Subtitle]: 少了那個酸味，吃起來好悶喔!. (33) [Subtitle]: 哇靠...這比醃小黃瓜還好吃. (34) [Variety]: 太扯了. (35) [Subtitle]: 吃了油膩的食物的時候 可以配看看這個. (36) [Subtitle]: 我就說吃東西我真的有天份. (37) [Variety]: 有璟認證組合!. [Logo]: 🇰🇷.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a white oversized T-shirt with a cartoon graphic (My Melody) and light-colored shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor living space featuring white walls, dark wood door frames, a computer desk with a monitor in the background, and a black mesh chair.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice speaking Chinese with an upbeat, rhythmic background pop track. The music has a clear electronic beat around 126 BPM. The vocal delivery is fast-paced and enthusiastic. (2) A transition occurs with a comedic 'bubble pop' SFX as the creator struggles with the jar. Grunting vocalizations and short, strained breaths are heard, followed by a lighthearted, synthesized variety show giggle effect. (3) Distinct, high-frequency percussive crunching sounds (transients) dominate as the creator bites into the mango slices. These 'munching' sounds are crisp and amplified. Her vocal tone shifts to an elongated 'Mmm' sound, indicating satisfaction. (4) The final phase features the combination of chewing sounds from the burger and mangoes, with the background music swelling slightly in volume. The vocal energy remains high with frequent rising intonations as she delivers her final recommendation, ending with a synthesized 'ding' sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Struggle/Opening -> Tasting/Review -> New Combination/Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a local Taiwanese specialty (Lovers' Mango) and suggest a unique food pairing with hamburgers, aimed at a lifestyle and foodie audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be an organic food review based on personal discovery rather than a paid sponsorship.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media-native editing with high-density text overlays and expressive SFX to maintain viewer engagement.
